title: POV: A new feature enters the chat. 🕺✨
summary: Google for Developers posted a humorous video expressing empathy for software engineers dealing with new feature introductions. The video features speakers Justine Lai, M.E Francis, and Pete King and is presented as a relatable point-of-view piece about the developer experience.
writeup: This Google for Developers video takes a humorous point-of-view approach to a common moment in software engineering: a new feature entering an existing codebase and workflow. Speakers Justine Lai, M.E Francis, and Pete King frame it as a relatable piece about the developer experience and the disruption new features bring. The piece centers on empathy for engineers and the day-to-day reality of developer productivity rather than technical instruction.
